# line1ImageProvider

**Instance Property**

The image to display on the top line of the complication.

## Declaration

```swift
@NSCopying var line1ImageProvider: CLKImageProvider { get set }
```

## Setting the Complication Data

- **highlightLine2**: A Boolean value indicating which line should be drawn with a highlight.
- **line2TextProvider**: The text to display on the bottom line of the complication.
